title: Toyrific | Jump N Bounce Space Hopper Retro Exercise Ball, Toothy, 20-24inch, Multiple Designs
features: RETRO HOPPER: Jump N Bounce yourself everywhere with this classic 20 Inch Retro Space Hopper
INDOOR OR OUTDOOR: the suitable toy for bouncing fun outside or indoors for kids. This jumping ball is made from durable material to last kids a lifetime of bouncing around

BRIGHT DESIGN: with a fun toothy face in a bright blue colour and easy grab handles so kids can feel safe in their endless hours of fun. This ball is portable and easy to inflatable ideal for immediate play
IDEAL FOR KIDS: to encourage exercise whilst having fun; max user weight 50kg
GREAT GIFT: perfect gift for kids with high energy making this an ideal birthday or Christmas present for or ages 3+
description: From the manufacturer Bouncy Hopper Bounce into endless fun with the Jump ‘n’ Bounce Ball Space Hopper! The smaller bouncing ball is perfect for beginners wanting to begin their bouncing fun! The Jump ‘n’ Bounce Ball features easy grab handles for safe bouncing and the soft rubber material makes it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use! Quick Inflation The ideal bouncy hopper for indoor and outdoor play. Thanks for the durable vinyl material this ball is for long term use. Grab Handles The inflatable carry handles are ideal for kids to feel safe when they are bouncing around. Making this healthy exercise and fun! Suitable for Ages 3+ The bottom of the ball is secured with anti-slip material for the ultimate protection at all times!

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Encourage physical exercise and gross motor skills development through bouncing and jumping
